description.en: This method can be called from setup_scripts() or post_setup() in subclasses to assist in installing custom scripts into the virtual environment. path is the path to a directory that should contain subdirectories common, posix, nt; each containing scripts destined for the bin directory in the environment. The contents of common and the directory corresponding to os.name are copied after some text replacement of placeholders: __VENV_DIR__ is replaced with the absolute path of the environment d...
